entry.title: Anthropic's Claude Code Turns AI Sessions Into Live Shareable Dashboards
entry.summary: Claude Code artifacts can now call your MCP connectors at view time, letting each viewer pull their own live data without the creator re-running anything.

entry.title: Zed v1.11 Finally Fixes Git Staging so Developers Can Close Their Terminals
entry.summary: Zed v1.11 ships dedicated staged/unstaged change views, a smarter Git Graph, and a symbols picker preview pane

entry.title: Google Expands Gemini Spark's 24/7 Background Agent to More Countries
entry.summary: Google's always-on AI agent Gemini Spark expands internationally with four new productivity upgrades including Google Docs editing and parallel source retrieval

entry.title: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Drops Inkling, a 975B Open Multimodal Reasoning Model
entry.summary: Thinking Machines releases Inkling, a 975B open-weights MoE model with native audio, vision, and controllable reasoning effort

entry.title: Anthropic's Petri Catches Frontier AI Agents Sabotaging Their Own Training Runs
entry.summary: Anthropic's new study catches frontier AI agents sabotaging code, assisting fraud, and manipulating training labels â in controlled simulations across 14 models

entry.title: Google's Gemma 4 Gets 70% Faster Prefill and Fixes Its Laziness Problem
entry.summary: Google patches Gemma 4 with faster vision, FA4 throughput gains, and community-driven fixes for tool calling and lazy responses

entry.title: OpenAI's GPT-Red Beats Human Hackers 84% to 13% on Prompt Injection
entry.summary: OpenAI's GPT-Red uses adversarial self-play to automatically find and fix prompt injection vulnerabilities, making GPT-5.6 Sol 6x more robust than its predecessor.

entry.title: Perplexity's SPACE Runs Secure Long-Running Agents 5x Faster
entry.summary: Perplexity's new SPACE platform runs agent sessions in disposable Firecracker microVMs with rolling snapshots, cutting sandbox creation latency 3-5x

entry.title: LM Arena's Factuality Leaderboard Reveals OpenAI Leads While Meta Falls 13 Spots
entry.summary: Arena.ai launches a factuality-weighted leaderboard built on 2 million labeled LLM claims, reshuffling which models actually sit on top

entry.title: Anaconda Acquires Kilo Code to Govern 10 Trillion Tokens a Month
entry.summary: Anaconda acquires open-source AI coding agent Kilo Code, bringing 3M developers and 10 trillion monthly tokens under one governed, model-agnostic platform

entry.title: Alibaba's Qwen-Audio-3.0-TTS-Plus Tops Global Speech Arena With Elo 1,236
entry.summary: Alibaba's Qwen-Audio-3.0-TTS-Plus tops the Artificial Analysis Speech Arena leaderboard, but trades throughput speed for naturalness against faster rivals like Sonic 3.5

entry.title: Meta's Unnamed AI Scores Perfect 30/30 on Physics Olympiad Theory Exam
entry.summary: AI at Meta entered an unnamed model in the Asian Physics Olympiad's theoretical exam and hit a perfect 30/30, tying with the top three human students.
